content.text: REVIEW-PASS: 5.1.1(ii) — NSCameraUsageDescription ("scan paper receipts you attach to a task") and NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription ("saves scanned receipt images ... when you tap Export") are both specific and match the actual feature implemented in ReceiptScannerView.swift (AVCaptureDevice.requestAccess for receipt scanning), no generic/placeholder text found.
